summary: Phase 2 Team Management testing completed. Backend: 31/31 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All Phase 2 pages working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created admin and team_member test users for Phase 2 testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 (Team Management) features fully tested and working. Backend endpoints tested: /api/leaves (CRUD + approve/reject), /api/reimbursements (CRUD + approve/reject/mark-paid), /api/performance-reviews (CRUD + submit/acknowledge), /api/onboarding (CRUD + submit/approve), /api/team-requests/pending.

backend_apis.POST /api/leaves: PASS - Create leave application with all 5 types (casual, sick, earned, unpaid, wfh)
backend_apis.GET /api/leaves: PASS - Admin sees all, team member sees own only
backend_apis.DELETE /api/leaves/{id}: PASS - Owner can delete pending, admin can delete any
backend_apis.POST /api/reimbursements: PASS - Create reimbursement with all 5 categories (travel, equipment, office_supplies, client_entertainment, other)
backend_apis.GET /api/reimbursements: PASS - Admin sees all, team member sees own
backend_apis.POST /api/performance-reviews: PASS - Supervisor creates review for team member
backend_apis.GET /api/performance-reviews: PASS - Returns reviews based on role
backend_apis.POST /api/onboarding: PASS - Create form with education and work experience arrays
backend_apis.GET /api/team-requests/pending: PASS - Returns summary of pending leaves, reimbursements, onboarding

leave_reimbursement_page.leave_applications_tab: PASS - Shows leaves with status badges (pending/approved/rejected)
leave_reimbursement_page.reimbursements_tab: PASS - Shows reimbursements with status badges and amounts
leave_reimbursement_page.apply_leave_dialog: PASS - Leave Type dropdown, Start/End Date, Reason textarea
leave_reimbursement_page.request_reimbursement_dialog: PASS - Category dropdown, Amount, Date, Project (optional), Description

performance_review_page.review_cards: PASS - Shows reviewer name, review period, rating stars, status badge
performance_review_page.create_review_dialog: PASS - Team member dropdown, Review period, Star rating, Strengths/Areas/Goals/Comments textareas

onboarding_page.my_form_tab: PASS - Shows editable form with all sections
onboarding_page.all_forms_tab: PASS - Admin can see all submitted forms
onboarding_page.form_sections: PASS - Personal Info, Emergency Contact, Bank Details, Education, Work Experience

TestLeaveTypeVariations.test_all_leave_types: PASS - casual, sick, earned, unpaid, wfh

TestReimbursementCategories.test_all_reimbursement_categories: PASS - travel, equipment, office_supplies, client_entertainment, other

mocked_apis.note: Google Drive, Gmail, and Zoho Sign integrations are in DEMO MODE as specified
